Core Features

Not just a number.
A full range of futures.

Most retirement apps give you a single projected number. LifeROI gives you confidence — because it shows how your plan holds up across 1,000 possible market scenarios.

🚀

Dynamic FIRE Planner

Build a multi-phase savings plan that mirrors real life: career changes, pay raises, early retirement, and beyond. Full control over every stage.

📊

Monte Carlo Simulation

Run 1,000 simulations on your personal financial plan. See your success rate, best case, worst case, and most likely outcome — all in seconds.

⚖️

Scenario Comparison

Save and compare up to 3 different retirement plans. Retire at 50 or 55? LifeROI shows you exactly what changes — side by side.

🧮

FIRE Calculators

When can I retire? How much do I need? What's my success probability? Get clear, data-backed answers to your most important financial questions.

📈

Inflation Tracker

Your retirement target adjusts automatically as real-world inflation data updates. Your plan always reflects current economic reality.

🔒

Private by Design

No account required. No bank connection. Your financial data never leaves your device. Set up in under 2 minutes using our guided wizard.

App Preview

Every screen
built for clarity.

From your home dashboard to detailed simulation charts — designed to make complex financial data instantly understandable.

Memory Dividend

Track the
life part, too.

Financial independence isn't just about numbers. Memory Dividends connect your milestones to your plan — because the point of saving is living.

📸

Log Life Moments

Capture memories alongside your financial progress — travel, experiences, milestones.

💰

See the Real Value

See the real cost — and priceless value — of each memory in your financial context.

🔔

Anniversary Reminders

Every year, LifeROI brings back the feeling of why you started saving in the first place.

Progress Tracking

Stay on track.
Month by month.

Compare your actual portfolio against your simulated targets each month. Know exactly where you stand against your P50 goal — and adjust when life happens.
